title: SolarSMP
description: A modpack to go with the SolarSMP server
body:
# What is SolarSMP?
The SolarSMP pack is made for the modded Survival multiplayer server(coming soon), and it will be intended to help newer players lean more about modded minecraft, with a quest system in the works and a community to help with any issues

SolarSMP creation and modlist has almost been entirely made by community choice, and will continue so as long as possible

As the server progress, so will this pack, we aim to make the server stay online, without a restart. for as long as possible. while keeping an active community
